aboutPage.bio: I build fast, clean websites for local businesses - from simple landing pages to full storefronts with ordering and CMS. Based in An Giang, available in-person or remote.
aboutPage.platform_q1: Ever wonder why platforms like TikTok or Shopee take 15 to 25% of every sale you make?
aboutPage.platform_q2: Ever think about how much more you'd keep with a platform of your own?
aboutPage.platform_p1: That fee is the price of using their audience. On 10 million in sales, you're handing back up to 2.5 million - every month, before any other cost.
aboutPage.platform_p2: Your own site flips that. Customers come to you directly. You keep every sale. No algorithm cutting your reach, no competitor listed next to your product.
aboutPage.platform_p3: Platforms are still worth using - they're where people find you. The move is to build something alongside them that you actually own.
aboutPage.custom_hook1: Take a moment and picture your ideal website.
aboutPage.custom_hook2: How it looks, how customers move through it, what it lets them do.
aboutPage.custom_p1: Most agencies today build with WordPress or pre-made templates. That means they pick a design that already exists, put your name and photos in, and hand it over. It's fast - but the structure, the flow, the features were decided by someone else, for a different business. Whatever you just pictured probably isn't in there.
aboutPage.custom_p2: We build every site from scratch, around what your business actually needs. No pre-made structure to work around. If you can picture it, we can build it.

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.subtitle: Pick whatever channel works best for you.

worksPage.title: Our Work
worksPage.subtitle: Websites built for local businesses across Vietnam
worksPage.cam_giang_body: Platform fees were eating 25% of every TikTok sale. Facebook orders came in through Messenger one message at a time - no structure, easy to miss. We built them an owned platform: a product catalog, a one-step order modal that skips the cart entirely, and a CMS to manage products, discounts, and orders themselves.

items.quote: The level of detail brought to technical SEO and minimalist design is unmatched. Our site loads in under a second and looks stunning.
items.name: Dinh Toan

items.quote: An absolute professional. We saw a significant increase in table reservations within the first weeks of launching our new site.
items.name: DUSK

items.quote: Elegant, fast, and exactly our vibe. He understood our vision for the barbershop from the very first consult.
items.name: Barber District

approach.heading: The way I see it.
approach.platform_q1: Ever wonder why platforms like TikTok or Shopee take 15 to 25% of every sale you make?
approach.platform_q2: Ever think about how much more you'd keep with a platform of your own?
approach.platform_body: That fee is the price of using their audience. On 10 million in sales, you're handing back up to 2.5 million every month. Your own site keeps every sale - and customers come back directly, no platform required.
approach.custom_hook1: Take a moment and picture your ideal website.
approach.custom_hook2: How it looks, how customers move through it, what it lets them do.
approach.custom_body: Most agencies build with WordPress or pre-made templates - fast, but designed for businesses in general, not yours. I build from scratch around what your business actually needs. If you can picture it, I can build it.
